patterns.name: tokens_over_literals
patterns.rule: Use token variables for all visual values.

patterns.name: plus_component_first
patterns.rule: Prefer PLUS components/forms/specs before generic framework primitives.

patterns.name: story_driven_verification
patterns.rule: Update and validate stories for behavior/state changes.

patterns.name: figma_to_code
patterns.rule: Fetch design context/screenshot first, then map to DS components/specs.

patterns.name: state_completeness
patterns.rule: Cover default/hover/focus/active/disabled and loading/error where relevant.

patterns.name: responsive_verification
patterns.rule: Use md/lg/xl checks and ResponsiveFrame patterns for page-level UI.

patterns.name: card_styling_alignment
patterns.rule: Align section/chart card styling with admin spec patterns.

patterns.name: table_styling_alignment
patterns.rule: Respect global table behavior and align table SCSS with admin implementations.

patterns.name: documentation_coherence
patterns.rule: Keep docs/examples aligned with exports and remove stale paths.
